items.headline: Steelers place unrestricted free-agent tender on Aaron Rodgers
items.description:
PITTSBURGH (AP) — The Pittsburgh Steelers have left the door wide open for Aaron Rodgers to return.
Still, the club gave itself a little bit of protection in case he does not.

items.headline: Rajasthan's Sooryavanshi hammers 43 as Punjab suffer first loss
items.description: Fifteen-year-old Vaibhav Sooryavanshi became the leading run-getter in this IPL season with a cracking 43 on Tuesday that helped Rajasthan Royals beat Punjab Kings by...

items.description: Harry Kane leads the Bayern Munich attack into the first leg of their Champions League semi-final against Paris Saint-Germain on Tuesday, while Khvicha Kvaratskhelia will hope to continue his fine...

items.headline: NBA Executives of the Year
items.description:
2026 — Brad Stevens, Boston Celtics
2025 — Sam Presti, Oklahoma City

items.headline: Penguins are a win away from forcing a Game 7 at home against the Flyers after trailing series 3-0
items.description:
The Pittsburgh Penguins are halfway to history.
Sidney Crosby and the Penguins are aiming to become just the fifth team in NHL history to win a series after trailing 3-0. They’ve won two straight games to force Game 6 in Philadelphia on Wednesday night.

items.headline: Michigan basketball reloads with 9 newcomers for potential run to another national title
items.description:
ANN ARBOR, Mich. (AP) — Michigan has reloaded, shooting to repeat as college basketball national champions with nine newcomers.
Wolverines coach Dusty May announced Tuesday that three players have been added from the transfer portal and two incoming freshman are joining four high school seniors who were signed in November.

items.headline: Rockets' Kevin Durant makes progress with injury but a return for Game 5 vs. Lakers seems unlikely
items.description:
HOUSTON (AP) — Houston’s Kevin Durant continues to make progress with his injured left ankle, but it seems unlikely that he’ll return Wednesday night for Game 5 against the Los Angeles Lakers.
Durant didn’t participate in practice with the Rockets on Tuesday before they left for California, trailing 3-1 in the first-round series. But he was seen running on an anti-gravity treadmill as the team wrapped up its work before heading to the airport.

items.headline: Women's British Open gets another bump in prize money to $10 million
items.description:
Prize money keeps going up at the women's majors.
The Chevron Championship bumped its purse an additional $1 million two days before the opening round to a record $9 million, and Nelly Korda went wire-to-wire to claim the $1.35 million top prize.

items.headline: Ex-NBA player Damon Jones becomes first defendant to plead guilty in a gambling sweep that netted more than 30 arrests
items.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Ex-NBA player Damon Jones becomes first defendant to plead guilty in a gambling sweep that netted more than 30 arrests.
